description_long: This information point is a modern exhibition booth designed for events or expos, featuring a combination of open seating and interactive digital displays. The left section is styled as a lounge area with wooden flooring, white chairs, round tables, and green wall panels, creating a welcoming space for visitors to sit and converse. The right section is more technology-focused, with a sleek white counter, a large digital screen, and several colorful vertical kiosks for interactive information access. Overhead, a curved blue banner with branding provides high visibility, while the booth is partially enclosed by low wooden fences and decorative plants. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, comfort, and digital engagement, with clear branding and signage throughout. The materials and finishes suggest a contemporary, professional aesthetic suitable for urban public spaces or trade shows.
description: A contemporary exhibition booth with lounge seating, digital displays, and colorful interactive kiosks, designed for public information and engagement. The structure combines wood, metal, and plastic elements with prominent branding and a welcoming layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lounge area with white chairs and tables, green wall panels, a large digital screen, and the main branding on the counter and overhead banner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the colorful vertical kiosks, the white counter, and the plant decor, with the lounge area visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the curved blue overhead banner and the enclosed back of the booth, with minimal detail of the interactive areas.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the lounge seating and the interactive kiosks, as well as the partial wooden fencing and plant decor.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features a mix of smooth white and wood-textured surfaces, accented by a large blue curved banner and green wall panels. Colorful vertical kiosks and digital screens add visual interest, while the branding is prominently displayed on both the counter and overhead signage.
